title: Here's Why You Should Hold Hartford Financial (HIG) Stock

title: The Hartford Named One Of ‘World's Most Ethical Companies' For 13th Time By Ethisphere
text: HARTFORD, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Hartford has been named one of the World's Most Ethical Companies® for the 13th time, as designated by Ethisphere, a global leader in defining and advancing the standards of ethical business practices. “We are proud to be recognized for the thirteenth time as a World's Most Ethical Company, a designation that demonstrates the strength of our character,” said The Hartford's Chairman and CEO Christopher Swift. “The Hartford's values guide our actions. title: The Hartford Introduces New Critical Illness Product To Cover More Conditions And Provide A Wider Range Of Benefits
text: HARTFORD, Conn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Hartford has introduced a new critical illness insurance product that covers more health conditions and provides a wider range of benefits.
